Metadata.title: Antiblaze | Duracol
Metadata.description: English landing page for Antiblaze with snap scrolling, fixed navigation, and full-screen sections.

section1.title: The next generation in thermal protection
section1.description:
<brand>Antiblaze®</brand> is the evolution of Duralfoil®: more modern, safer, and engineered to meet current standards for energy efficiency, safety, and regulatory compliance in industrial and commercial applications.

It blocks radiant heat before it enters the building, improving thermal performance and day-to-day operational efficiency.
section1.credibilityLine: Proven in demanding industrial and commercial environments

stat2.label: Clients served in Colombia, Ecuador, Panama, and Venezuela

section2.title: High-Performance Thermal Control
section2.problemLine1: Roof systems absorb solar heat and transfer it indoors.
section2.problemLine2: That raises interior temperature and affects people, operations, products, and energy costs.
section2.problem: Roof systems absorb solar heat and transfer it indoors. This increases temperature and directly impacts operations, comfort, and energy costs.

installation.label: Installed under
installation.value: Metal, fiber cement, concrete, and other roof systems

section2.product: Antiblaze® is a reflective insulation layer installed beneath the roof that blocks radiant heat before it reaches the interior.
section2.howItWorks: It reduces heat transfer by radiation before it enters the space, while also helping with moisture and vapor control plus acoustic support.

benefit1.title: Lower interior heat load
benefit1.description: Reduces heat transfer from the roof and helps maintain a more stable indoor temperature.

benefit2.title: Lower cooling demand
benefit2.description: Reduces the load on air conditioning and ventilation, helping lower energy operating costs.

benefit3.title: Moisture and condensation control
benefit3.description: Helps limit condensation points under the roof and improves system behavior in demanding environments.

benefit4.title: Better operational continuity
benefit4.description: Supports more controlled conditions for personnel, equipment, inventory, and heat-sensitive processes.

section2.support: Antiblaze® combines thermal performance, fire resistance, and durability in one practical under-roof solution.
section2.ctaSupport: ASSESS THERMAL IMPACT ON YOUR PROJECT
section2.ctaMicrocopy: Fast technical guidance to define the right solution.
section2.comparisonHelper: Slide to compare a roof without installation versus a roof with Antiblaze®.
section2.comparisonKeyboardHint: Use the left and right arrow keys to move the comparison.
section2.comparisonBeforeAlt: Roof without reflective insulation, showing higher solar heat transfer into the interior.
section2.comparisonAfterAlt: Roof with Antiblaze® installed, showing lower radiant heat transfer into the interior.

technical1.title: Lower thermal transfer
technical1.description: Reduces the flow of heat from the roof into the interior.

technical2.title: More efficient and sustainable
technical2.description: Helps reduce energy use and supports a more responsible operation.

technical3.title: Lightweight, safe, and durable
technical3.description: Installed beneath the roof without adding significant structural load, with long-term performance.

section3.title: Proven experience behind every installation
section3.intro: Since 1997, we have delivered under-roof insulation solutions across Colombia with strong technical criteria, qualified execution, and a focus on measurable results.

credibility.title: Execution backed by international support and local accountability
credibility.body: Antiblaze is the current evolution of Duralfoil. Our operation in Colombia is supported by an exclusive representation and import relationship, and every project is executed with installation protocols, quality controls, and qualified personnel.

points.point1: Exclusive representation and import relationship in Colombia
points.point2: International manufacturing backing for system continuity
points.point3: Standardized installation protocols and quality control
points.point4: Qualified technical staff and trained installation crews

process.title: How we execute each project
process.description: A practical four-step flow to define the right technical solution, install with control, and deliver with verification.

step1.title: Project assessment
step1.description: We evaluate roof typology, thermal behavior, and operational conditions.

step2.title: Technical definition
step2.description: We define the system, project scope, and installation route.

step3.title: Supply and installation
step3.description: We coordinate supply and execute the work with trained field teams.

step4.title: Delivery and verification
step4.description: We close with technical validation and documented handover.

coverage.title: National coverage across Colombia
coverage.description: We serve projects in major cities and regional hubs with operational capability for nationwide deployment.

gallery.title: Completed projects across industrial and commercial sectors
gallery.description: Representative references that show real field execution and operational performance targets.

project1.title: Industrial plant - improved thermal stability
project1.summary: Under-roof implementation to reduce heat load and improve process conditions.

project2.title: Logistics warehouse - radiant heat control
project2.summary: Reflective solution for high-bay logistics operations with continuous occupancy.

project3.title: Commercial installation - roof retrofit
project3.summary: Technical intervention to improve indoor thermal behavior in a high-traffic environment.

project4.title: Agro-industrial operation - controlled conditions
project4.summary: Installation focused on achieving greater indoor stability for heat-sensitive processes.

section3.closingStatement: More than two decades of field execution support every Antiblaze recommendation. We focus on solutions that are installed correctly, maintain performance, and deliver measurable value.
section3.ctaSupport: Define the right technical path for your roofing project.

section4.title: Send us a message
section4.description: Tell us about your project and we will help you define the right solution for your roof.
section4.submitHelper: Submitting opens your email client with the message ready to send.
section4.contactInfoTitle: Direct channels for support and sales
section4.contactInfoDescription:
Duracol is the exclusive importer and representative of Antiblaze® in Colombia.
You can also reach us by WhatsApp or email for support, sales, and quotations.
section4.responseText: Share the key details of your project and we will reply through the most suitable channel.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project, roof type, or current need.
